content.body:
Point 6 for excluding is a bit weird, because all of the individual time units are already supported by ECMA-402, and Intl.DurationFormat even uses Intl.NumberFormat internally to format them.

Including open questions on Amount in this context is a bit weird, esp. as the slides are solely about Intl.NumberFormat. I would also disagree with the characterisation that any of the Amount questions are actually open questions; its units support is solely and completely driven by what's in units.xml, and that clearly includes both `time` and year-duration` units.

Otherwise it looks good!
